refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined productivity target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR includes a measurement unit ('measured in m³/h or ton/h'), which is a solution detail related to how productivity is quantified rather than what the system must do. Removing measurement specifics keeps the FR solution-neutral. The FR contains a single obligation: support achieving the productivity target, so it is atomic.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through operational testing and data collection that the NGHE solution enables meeting or exceeding the customer-defined productivity target over the agreed evaluation period, independent of measurement units used.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined productivity target.

candidate_dps: Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback
Enable adaptive task scheduling to optimize workflow
Incorporate operator input for dynamic productivity adjustments
Implement automated performance reporting aligned with targets
selected_dp.selected_dp: Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback

potential_sources: Dependency on accurate data inputs from multiple subsystems
Integration with safety and operational policy modules
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP focuses on monitoring and feedback, which can be modularized independently from scheduling or operator input functions, supporting decoupling.

assumptions_risks: Accurate and timely data collection is feasible within operational constraints
Productivity targets are clearly defined and measurable
Safety plans and operational policies do not conflict with productivity monitoring requirements
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly separating monitoring from control or scheduling functions in future refinements to maintain modular independence and reduce coupling risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The NGHE Solution module encompasses the overall system responsible for managing and delivering real-time productivity monitoring and feedback functionalities.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time data streams from vehicle and other sensors for productivity analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends feedback and task updates to operators based on productivity monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Handles communication with external systems and remote monitoring centers.

module_containment_scores.notes: High cohesion as productivity monitoring and feedback is a core function of the NGHE Solution; minimal diffusion outside this module.
Vehicle collects raw data but does not process or provide feedback; containment is partial and diffusion is high.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control, not productivity monitoring; poor containment and high diffusion.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety, unrelated to productivity monitoring; very poor containment and high diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary to contain the DP 'Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback' because it centralizes data processing, analysis, and feedback delivery, minimizing diffusion and maximizing cohesion.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Vehicle module if some monitoring functions are embedded in vehicle hardware/software.
Dependency on Telemetry interface reliability may affect real-time feedback accuracy.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP 'Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback' directly addresses the FR of supporting achievement of the customer-defined productivity target by enabling monitoring and feedback mechanisms necessary to meet or exceed the target.

diffusion_risks: Potential overlap with Vehicle module if some monitoring functions are embedded in vehicle hardware/software.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module shows high cohesion and minimal diffusion for the DP, with a containment score of 9 and diffusion score of 2, indicating effective packaging of the DP within a single module. Other modules have lower containment and higher diffusion scores, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through monitoring reported productivity during representative operations to ensure it meets or exceeds the productivity target over the agreed evaluation period, as per acceptance criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The DP is clearly allocated to the NGHE Solution module, which owns the real-time monitoring and feedback functionality, with well-defined external interfaces supporting data input and feedback output.

recommended_revisions: Clarify and document any monitoring functions embedded in the Vehicle module to reduce overlap and diffusion risk.
Ensure robustness and reliability of the Telemetry interface to maintain accuracy and timeliness of real-time feedback.
Consider defining explicit interface contracts between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules to manage dependencies and reduce diffusion.

decision.justification: All gates have passed, indicating that the current FR, DP, and IM mappings are sound and verification is feasible. However, given the high safety criticality and identified diffusion risks related to overlap with the Vehicle module, further decomposition of the FR into sub-FRs is warranted to clarify and isolate specific monitoring and feedback functions. This will help address diffusion risks, improve interface definition, and enhance robustness and reliability of the system.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide feedback to operator based on productivity data
Ensure robustness and reliability of telemetry interface
Manage interface contracts between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules

revise.why: To clarify and document monitoring functions embedded in the Vehicle module and define explicit interface contracts to reduce overlap and diffusion risk.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module is the primary owner of real-time monitoring and feedback functionality.
Vehicle module may contain some embedded monitoring functions causing overlap.
Telemetry interface is critical for timely and accurate feedback.
open_risks: Potential overlap and diffusion risk between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.
Reliability of telemetry interface impacting real-time feedback accuracy.
evidence_needed: Detailed documentation of monitoring functions in Vehicle module.
Interface contracts between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.
Verification data showing productivity monitoring meets targets during operations.
